title: melica ciliata var. laxiflora
intro: Melica ciliata var. laxiflora, also known as laxiflora melic, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Melica ciliata var. laxiflora include relieving coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as soothing digestive problems and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create teas, tinctures, or infusions.
